mapper.select: SELECT SELL_USIM_KEY , FILE_MASK AS FILE_NM , SYS_RDATE , '/jboss/data/mcp/upload/sellusim/' || TO_CHAR(SYS_RDATE, 'YYYY') || '/' || TO_CHAR(SYS_RDATE, 'MM') || '/' || FILE_MASK AS FILE_PATH FROM MCP_SELL_USIM@DL_MCP WHERE TO_CHAR(SYS_RDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 20, 'YYYYMMDD') AND DEL_YN IS NULL AND SSTATE != '20' AND FILE_MASK IS NOT NULL AND FILE_MASK <> 'icon-SuppSvc_01.png'
mapper.update: UPDATE MCP_SELL_USIM@DL_MCP SET DEL_YN = 'Y' , DEL_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE FILE_MASK = #{fileNm}
